name: Cinnamon
specimenCopy: True cinnamon rolls into paper-soft layers. What's usually sold as cinnamon — cassia — peels off in a single hard curl. Different plants. Different results. This is the one that earned the name first.

sensoryProfile.aroma: Sweet bark, delicate clove bud, warm oil
sensoryProfile.flavor: Mild, woody sweetness with complex aromatic overtones
sensoryProfile.appearance: Delicate, multi-layered quill rolls, fragile texture
